heading: Treatment of other federally assisted housing
label: 13618 Treatment of other federally assisted housing

children.heading: Restricted occupancy
children.label: a Restricted occupancy
children.text: An owner of any federally assisted project (or portion of a project) as described in subparagraphs (D), (E), and (F) of that was designed for occupancy by elderly families may continue to restrict occupancy in such project (or portion) to elderly families in accordance with the rules, standards, and agreements governing occupancy in such housing in effect at the time of the development of the housing.section 13641(2) of this title

children.heading: Prohibition of evictions
children.label: b Prohibition of evictions
children.text: Any tenant who is lawfully residing in a dwelling unit in a housing project described in subsection (a) may not be evicted or otherwise required to vacate such unit because of any reservation or preferences under this subchapter or because of any action taken by the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development or the owner of the project pursuant to this subchapter.
